title: Red PVP
description: A red Texturepack with changed Armor items and Tools.
body:
An Texturepack for PvP in a red Theme designed for PvP. Almost every Texture that is Important for pvp is changed.                                                                   
Made by Ikimann_.   
                                                                                                                     
A lot of the used textures are textures or edits from other texturepacks.So most if them are not my textures.                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
Credits:                                                                                              
Hotbar Selector, Hunger Bars: https://vanillatweaks.net                                         
Sideways Sield: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sideshieldpack                                                  
Apples: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-golden-apple                                              
Mace: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/amazing-mace-3d                                                                                    
Font: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/coolfont                                                         
Grass: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass                                        
Shield Sound: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alternative-shield-sound
